modules.name: Preparing for Class
modules.description: Foundations of instructional design, backward design, flipped classroom, experiential learning, the art of teaching, and preparation for the learning experience.

lessons.title: Foundations of Instructional Design
topics: Designing with intent towards specific outcomes

lessons.title: Flipped Classroom
topics: Making the most of the flipped classroom model
Pros and cons of flipped classroom

modules.name: Facilitating the Class
modules.description: Breaking down lessons, cultivating learning conditions, building relationships, motivating learners, and developing professional skills.

lessons.title: Breaking Down the Lesson
topics: Parts of a lesson: Introduction, Showing, Doing, Reflecting

lessons.title: Cultivating the Conditions for Learning
topics: Cultivating a relationship with the learner

modules.name: Providing Meaningful and Actionable Feedback
modules.description: Strategies and techniques for providing meaningful, actionable feedback to learners.

assessment.title: Summative Assessment
items: Module summative assessments with instructor feedback
Application within live class for continued learning and transfer
